**LIMIT clause**

> This documentation is for an out-of-date version of Apache Flink. We recommend you use the latest [stable version](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-stable/docs/dev/table/sql/queries/limit/>).

#  LIMIT clause #

Batch

`LIMIT` clause constrains the number of rows returned by the `SELECT` statement. In general, this clause is used in conjunction with ORDER BY to ensure that the results are deterministic.

The following example selects the first 3 rows in `Orders` table.


    SELECT *
    FROM Orders
    ORDER BY orderTime
    LIMIT 3
